"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.Doc = void 0; class Doc { constructor(args = []) { this.content = []; this.indent = 0; if (this) this.args = args; } indented(fn) { this.indent += 1; fn(this); this.indent -= 1; } write(arg) { if (typeof arg === "function") { arg(this, { execution: "sync" }); arg(this, { execution: "async" }); return; } const content = arg; const lines = content.split("\n").filter((x) => x); const minIndent = Math.min(...lines.map((x) => x.length - x.trimStart().length)); const dedented = lines.map((x) => x.slice(minIndent)).map((x) => " ".repeat(this.indent * 2) + x); for (const line of dedented) { this.content.push(line); } } compile() { const F = Function; const args = this?.args; const content = this?.content ?? [``]; const lines = [...content.map((x) => ` ${x}`)]; // console.log(lines.join("\n")); return new F(...args, lines.join("\n")); } } exports.Doc = Doc;
